headline: Tesla’s 10% Weight in ARKK Sets Up a Make-or-Break Year for the Innovation ETF
summary: The ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA:ARKK) has barely moved this year, gaining about 2% year to date through late June and sitting at roughly $78 per share. That stasis hides a violent tug of war inside the portfolio: AMD has more than doubled, up 144% YTD, while Coinbase has shed 34% and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA), ARKK’s largest ... Tesla’s 10% Weight in ARKK Sets Up a Make-or-Break Year for the Innovation ETF

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

raw.headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks with Competitive Advantages and 1 Facing Headwinds
